en: Miles's grades are pretty good A in AP Physics That's my little man And AP Studio.

en: Art He takes after his uncle A minus in English She's a tough grader And a B in Spanish What Ooh.

en: okay Miles are you trying to kill your mother Cálmate mami eso no es my fault ¿Qué es eso que esto?

en: no es my fault ¿Estás tomando una clase en español No I just missed a few classes Oh just a few classes Well what's a few I.
ko: 내 잘못 아니야. 스페인어 수업 듣는 거지? 아뇨 그냥 수업 좀 빠졌어요. 몇 번이나? 몇 번인데?
